title: API Alert: Using Correct Monday API v2 URL

posts.author: dsilva (Daniel Silva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey everyone! Hope everyone is having an awesome Friday in the community. I wanted to make a quick post on a recent change regarding API queries in case anyone runs into this.

Previously we were supporting hitting custom URLs (based on your slug) for querying the v2 of the API. This was a bit of an obscure feature that a few users used which meant you could point at your account URL. For example:

https://dsilva.monday.com/v2/

This will no longer work. Instead you will want to use the direct link to query the API:

https://api.monday.com/v2/

If you’re already using the API url, you don’t have to worry about anything. Hope this helps - as always if there’s any questions / comments please let us know.

Stay awesome everyone!
